---
title: "Shiny App"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## Open The App

Use the local launch link below when the Shiny process is already running on port `3838`.

::: {.grid-cards}
::: {.card-block}
### Launch Local App

[Open the local Shiny app](http://127.0.0.1:3838){target="_blank"}

This opens the running app in a new browser tab.
:::

::: {.card-block}
### Run Command

```r
shiny::runApp("app")
```

Or from the project root:

```powershell
Rscript run_app.R 3838
```
:::
:::

## Embedded Preview

When the app is running locally, the frame below gives the website a direct in-page entry point into the Shiny prototype.

```{=html}
<div style="background:#fff;border:1px solid #e3d8c8;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(27,41,45,0.06);">
  <div style="padding:0.9rem 1rem;border-bottom:1px solid #eadfce;background:#fffaf3;font-weight:700;">
    Local Shiny Preview (`http://127.0.0.1:3838`)
  </div>
  <iframe
    src="http://127.0.0.1:3838"
    title="Singapore Tourism Time-Series VA Prototype"
    style="width:100%;height:900px;border:0;background:#fff;"
    loading="lazy">
  </iframe>
</div>
```

## Current Module Status

| Module | Current status | Current focus |
|---|---|---|
| Time Series Visual Analysis | placeholder shell | integration target for Xi branch |
| Time Series Clustering | active prototype | Wang branch interaction and visual refinement |
| Forecasting | placeholder shell | integration target for Jin branch |

## Data Contract

The current clustering workflow reads from:

- `data/raw/visitor_arrivals_full_dataset.xlsx`
- `data/processed/clustering_country_wide.csv`
- `data/processed/clustering_country_long.csv`

## Expected User Flow

1. Open the Shiny app from this page.
2. Enter the `Time Series Clustering` tab.
3. Select a focused set of countries.
4. Choose a year window and normalization mode.
5. Review the outputs in order: `Overview`, `Patterns`, `Assignments`, `Series Metrics`.

## Notes For Local Testing

1. Keep the browser window at a normal desktop width when checking layout quality.
2. If the embedded frame is blank, start the app first and refresh this page.
3. Use the standalone launch link above if your browser blocks the embedded frame.
